Meaning.En: A thick cloud of tiny water droplets suspended in the atmosphere near the ground, reducing visibility.
Meaning.Example: The plane was delayed due to heavy fog at the airport.

Situation.Vi: Mưa nhỏ, không khí ẩm ướt, tầm nhìn bị hạn chế nghiêm trọng vào buổi sáng.
Situation.En: Low-lying moisture condenses near the ground on cool mornings, creating hazardous driving conditions.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh báo sương mù được phát khi tầm nhìn xuống dưới 200 mét.
Situation.En: Transportation authorities issue fog warnings when visibility drops below 200 meters.

Meaning.Vi: Làm mờ, che mờ (như sương mù)
Meaning.En: To become covered or obscured by fog; to make something unclear or indistinct.
Meaning.Example: The windows fogged up as the warm air met the cold glass.

Situation.Vi: Mặt kính cửa sổ bị mờ đi do hơi nước ngưng tụ.
Situation.En: The bathroom mirror fogs after a hot shower.

Situation.Vi: Ký ức bị mờ dần theo thời gian.
Situation.En: Memories of childhood can fog over with time.
